title: Optimized Portfolio (Post-Analysis)
outcome: Portfolio reconstructed to maximize risk-adjusted return and lower beta/correlation. Persistent underperformers, clustered high-beta names, and high-correlation REITs/laggards removed. New tickers (ABBV, DUK, MDLZ, AIZ, JXI) added from stock_screener for low beta/high Sharpe, better sector/industry diversification, and improved drawdown ballast. Allocations adjusted for more even exposure and defense. All changes justified with tool-driven Sharpe, stress, and correlation analytics.
